Ideally you have a few in the mix. So wherever you are, there's always this panic of when is, I know this creative is going to die, so I need to be working on more creatives. So a question from Justin Lucas said, do you normally use automated types of bidding for YouTube ads or manual bidding? We'll do target CPA.
